---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product, workflow, or contributor-experience improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the user or contributor problem clearly.

## Proposed change

Describe the outcome you want, not just the implementation.

## Scope

- Area affected:
- User-visible impact:
- Developer-visible impact:

## Acceptance signals

What would make this feel done? Include commands, screens, or workflows where relevant.

## Evidence or references

Link related issues, docs, screenshots, or benchmark data if available.
